title: Cradleboard Model (Image Not Displayed)
desc: Maker / Artist: Mrs. Moore; Production Date: 1922; Accession Date: 1922; Collection Site: File Hills Agency; Courtesy of the Royal Saskatchewan Museum

title: Cradle Hood
desc: Cradle hood of buckskin broad beaded band down each opening edge. Pendants of blue glass beads. Accession Year: 1903; Accession Number: 851; Collected by: Stephen C. Simms; Collection Site: North America, Canada, Saskatchewan, Day Star Reserve; Courtesy of Chicago Field Museum

title: Cradle and Charm (Image Not Available)
desc: Cradle and charm to protect children from coughs and colds. Not found in collections storage; no photograph available. Accession Year: 1893; Accession Number: 46; Collected by: Isaac Cowie; Collection Site: North America, Canada, Alberta, Edmonton; Courtesy of Chicago Field Museum

title: Child's Cradle
desc: The board is painted with red and white flowers and yellow six-pointed stars on top surface, while the under surface carries a flowered design in many colors. The container for the child is natural buckskin with painted brown circles and dots. Buckskin carrying strap. Accession Year: 1893; Accession Number: 23; Collected by: E.F. Wilson; Collection Site: North America, Canada, Alberta, Edmonton; Courtesy of Chicago Field Museum

title: Infant Moss Bag
desc: Infant moss bag. Accession Year: 1893; Accession Number: 46; Collected by: Isaac Cowie; Collection Site: North America, Canada, Alberta, Edmonton; Courtesy of Chicago Field Museum
